mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TAB_FUND_FLOW (S_ID, S_TENANT_ID, I_FLOW_TYPE, I_DIRECTION, I_AMOUNT, S_PARTY_ID, S_SOURCE_NO, S_CATEGORY_ID, D_OCCUR_DATE, S_REMARK, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER) VALUES (#{sId}, #{sTenantId}, #{iFlowType}, #{iDirection}, #{iAmount}, #{sPartyId}, #{sSourceNo}, #{sCategoryId}, #{dOccurDate}, #{sRemark}, #{dtCreateTime}, #{dtUpdateTime}, #{sCreateUser}, #{sUpdateUser})
mapper.select:
SELECT S_ID, I_FLOW_TYPE, I_DIRECTION, I_AMOUNT, S_PARTY_ID, S_SOURCE_NO, S_CATEGORY_ID, D_OCCUR_DATE, S_REMARK, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_FUND_FLOW
ORDER BY D_OCCUR_DATE DESC, DT_CREATE_TIME DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TAB_FUND_FLOW WHERE S_CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId}
